item.title: 曝苹果折叠屏 iPhone 已在试产，今年下半年有望发布
item.guid: 曝苹果折叠屏-iPhone-已在试产，今年下半年有望发布
item.description:
According to China Securities Journal · China Securities Golden Bull, Apple's first foldable iPhone has entered the trial production stage. 据中国证券报·中证金牛座报道，苹果首款折叠屏 iPhone 已进入试产阶段。

Reports indicate that Foxconn has begun trial production of Apple's foldable screen iPhone. According to previously disclosed information from supply chain companies, Apple has provided suppliers with a shipment target guideline to launch its first foldable phone in the second half of this year, positioned as a large foldable iPhone. 报道指出，富士康已开始试产苹果折叠屏 iPhone 手机。根据此前供应链公司透露的消息，苹果给供应商提供的出货目标指引为今年下半年推出首款折叠屏手机，定位为一款大折叠屏 iPhone。

Bloomberg reporter Mark Gurman also stated that iOS 27 will be adapted for the foldable iPhone Fold. 彭博社记者 Mark Gurman 也曾表示，iOS 27 将对折叠屏 iPhone Fold 做适配。

It is reported that iOS 27 will have a new layout on the iPhone Fold: when the device is unfolded, the overall interface will resemble iPadOS more, and there might also be an app navigation bar similar to iPadOS on the left side. 据悉，iOS 27 在 iPhone Fold 上将拥有全新的布局：设备展开时，整体界面会更像 iPadOS，并且左侧或许还会拥有类似 iPadOS 的应用导航栏。

Previously, research firm Counterpoint pointed out that as Apple prepares to launch its first foldable iPhone, the foldable phone market will enter a new competitive phase in 2026. 此前研究机构 Counterpoint 曾指出，随着苹果准备推出其首款折叠屏 iPhone，折叠屏手机市场将在 2026 年进入新的竞争阶段。

Given the high-end positioning of foldable screens, early demand for Apple's foldable iPhone is expected to come primarily from existing iPhone users. Some users considering book-style foldable phones may also view Apple's upcoming device as an alternative option, thereby increasing the likelihood of ecosystem migration. 鉴于折叠屏的高端定位，苹果折叠屏 iPhone 的早期需求预计将主要来自现有 iPhone 用户。一部分正在考虑书本式折叠屏的用户，也可能将苹果即将推出的设备视作替代选项，从而提升生态迁移的可能性。

item.title: 代号「土豆」，曝 GPT-6 本月发布
item.guid: 代号「土豆」，曝-GPT-6-本月发布
item.description:
GPT-6, internally codenamed "Spud" (potato), underwent two years of secret development and completed pre-training on March 24 at the Stargate data center in Texas. 内部代号「Spud」（土豆）的 GPT-6 历经两年秘密研发，于 3 月 24 日在德克萨斯州的 Stargate 数据中心完成预训练。

OpenAI President Greg Brockman personally confirmed the model's existence in a podcast interview, stating it "is not an incremental improvement, but a significant change in how we think about model development." Sam Altman told all employees on the same day that it is "a very powerful model that can truly accelerate economic development." OpenAI 总裁 Greg Brockman 在播客访谈中亲口确认了该模型的存在，称其「不是增量改进，而是我们思考模型开发方式的重大改变」。Sam Altman 同日向全体员工表示，这是「一个非常强大的模型，可以真正加速经济发展」。

According to leaked documents, GPT-6 shows over 40% improvement in coding, reasoning, and AI agent tasks compared to GPT-5.4, and its context window has expanded from 1 million tokens to 2 million. 根据泄露文档，GPT-6 在编码、推理和 AI 智能体任务上比 GPT-5.4 提升 40% 以上，上下文窗口从 100 万 token 扩展至 200 万。

Brockman also introduced the concept of "Big Model Smell" (the aura of large models ) , emphasizing the model's ability to proactively align with user intent without repeated prompting. Furthermore, the model supports native unified processing of text, images, audio, and video, and possesses stronger long-range AI agent autonomous operation capabilities. Brockman 还提出了「Big Model Smell」（大模型的气息 ） 概念，强调模型能够主动对齐用户意图，无需反复提示。此外，该模型支持文本、图像、音频、视频的原生统一处理，并具备更强的长程 AI 智能体自主运行能力。

Regarding pricing, leaks indicate an input price of approximately $2.5 per million tokens and an output price of $12 per million tokens, which is largely consistent with GPT-5.4. Several leaker bloggers claim the new model will be released on April 14, but official confirmation is still pending. 定价方面，爆料显示输入价格约为 2.5 美元/百万 token，输出为 12 美元/百万 token，与 GPT-5.4 基本持平。多位爆料博主称新模型将在 4 月 14 日发布，但尚未获得官方确认。

Less than 24 hours after GPT-6 completed pre-training, OpenAI announced the shutdown of its video generation product Sora and simultaneously canceled its $1 billion character licensing agreement with Disney. GPT-6 完成预训练后不到 24 小时，OpenAI 宣布关停视频生成产品 Sora，并同步取消与迪士尼价值 10 亿美元的角色授权协议。

Altman personally called Disney CEO Bob Iger to apologize. In a recent interview, he explained the reason for the shutdown: "The core issue is computing power; it's always a matter of computing power." Altman 亲自致电迪士尼 CEO Bob Iger 道歉。他在近期访谈中解释关停原因：「核心在于算力，永远都是算力的问题。」

🔗 Related Reading: GPT-6 is exposed, but Altman has become Silicon Valley's most anxious person 🔗 相关阅读： GPT-6 曝光了，奥特曼却成了硅谷最焦虑的人

item.title: 罗福莉谈 Anthropic 封杀「龙虾」：情有可原，OpenClaw 上下文管理「糟透了」
item.guid: 罗福莉谈-Anthropic-封杀「龙虾」：情有可原，OpenClaw-上下文管理「糟透了」
item.description:
Yesterday, Luo Fuli (@_LuoFuli), head of Xiaomi's MiMo team, posted on X, commenting on Anthropic's recent decision to cut off third-party tool frameworks (harnesses) from accessing Claude's subscription services. 昨天，小米 MiMo 团队负责人罗福莉（@_LuoFuli）在 X 发文，对 Anthropic 近日切断第三方工具框架（harness）对 Claude 订阅服务的访问权限一事进行评价。

It is reported that this move directly affected AI agent development tools such as "Lobster" OpenClaw, which rely on Claude's subscription interface. 据悉，此举直接影响了「龙虾」OpenClaw 等依赖 Claude 订阅接口的 AI 智能体开发工具。

Luo Fuli pointed out that Claude Code's subscription mechanism itself is a "carefully designed system for balanced allocation of computing power," but after third-party frameworks were integrated, this system bore far more pressure than anticipated. 罗福莉指出，Claude Code 的订阅机制本身是一套「经过精心设计的算力均衡分配系统」，但在第三方框架接入后，这套系统承受了远超预期的压力。

Taking OpenClaw as an example, she elaborated on its serious flaws in context management: 她以 OpenClaw 为例，详细说明了其上下文管理存在的严重缺陷：

When processing a single user request, OpenClaw triggers multiple rounds of low-value tool calls, each carrying a long context window of over 100,000 tokens. Even with cache hits, there is significant waste, and in extreme cases, it can increase the cache miss rate for other requests. The actual number of requests is several times that of Claude Code's native framework, and when converted to API pricing, the true cost could be dozens of times the subscription price.

She described this disparity as "not a chasm, but a deep pit." 她将这一差距形容为「不是鸿沟，而是深坑」。

Regarding this ban, Luo Fuli believes that the short-term pain is actually a positive pressure. After third-party frameworks are forced to switch to API payments, the pressure of costs increasing dozens of times will compel developers to improve context management, enhance prompt cache hit rates, and reduce invalid token consumption, stating that "pain will ultimately transform into engineering discipline." 对于此次封禁措施，罗福莉认为短期阵痛反而是正向压力。第三方框架被迫转向 API 付费后，成本骤增数十倍的压力将倒逼开发者改善上下文管理、提升 prompt 缓存命中率、削减无效 Token 消耗，「痛苦最终会转化为工程纪律」。

She also warned other large model manufacturers, urging them not to blindly follow the price war before clarifying the pricing model for programming subscription plans. 她同时向其他大模型厂商发出警示，呼吁在尚未厘清编程订阅计划定价模型之前，不要盲目跟进价格战。

Selling Tokens at a low price while opening the door to third-party frameworks may seem user-friendly, but it is actually a trap—Anthropic has just climbed out of this pit.

She also pointed out that if users continuously use low-quality AI agent frameworks, unstable inference services, and downgraded models to control costs, they will ultimately still be unable to complete actual tasks. This creates a vicious cycle for user experience and retention. 她还指出，若用户长期使用低质量的 AI 智能体框架、不稳定的推理服务和为控制成本而降级的模型，最终仍无法完成实际任务，这对用户体验和留存都是恶性循环。

🔗 Related reading: Big U-turn! Anthropic bans OpenClaw, Father of Lobster: Persuasion failed 🔗 相关阅读： 大翻脸！Anthropic 封杀 OpenClaw，龙虾之父：说服失败

item.title: AI 界再来新词：被淘汰恐惧 FOBO
item.guid: AI-界再来新词：被淘汰恐惧-FOBO
item.description:
According to a report released by Fortune magazine, combining the latest research from the Massachusetts Institute of Technology (MIT), the automation impact of artificial intelligence on the job market is developing gradually and is causing an increasingly intense "Fear of Becoming Obsolete (FOBO)" among the workplace population. 据《财富》杂志结合麻省理工学院（MIT）的最新研究发布报告，指出人工智能对就业市场的自动化冲击呈渐进式发展，且正引发职场群体日益加剧的「被淘汰恐惧（FOBO）」。

It is understood that FOBO stands for Fear of Becoming Obsolete. Unlike traditional "unemployment anxiety," this emotion points more to "becoming irrelevant." 据悉，FOBO 全称为 Fear of Becoming Obsolete（对被淘汰的恐惧）。与传统「失业焦虑」不同，这种情绪更多指向「自己会变得无关紧要」。

In its latest report, "Crashing Waves vs. Rising Tides," the MIT research team conducted 17,000 manual evaluations of more than 40 cutting-edge large models, including GPT-5, Gemini 2.5 Pro, and DeepSeek R1. MIT 研究团队在最新报告《Crashing Waves vs. Rising Tides》中，对包括 GPT-5、Gemini 2.5 Pro 及 DeepSeek R1 在内的 40 余款前沿大模型进行了 1.7 万次人工评估。

Test results show that AI can currently complete 50% to 75% of text-based work tasks with minimum acceptable standards. The study points out that the AI task failure rate is decreasing at a rate of halving every 2 to 3 years; according to this trend, by 2029, AI is expected to complete most routine text work with an 80% to 95% success rate. 测试结果表明，AI 目前已能以最低合格标准完成 50% 至 75% 的文本类工作任务。研究指出，AI 任务失败率正以每 2 至 3 年减半的速度下降；按此趋势测算，至 2029 年，AI 预计能以 80% 至 95% 的成功率完成大部分常规文本工作。

The sense of crisis among the workplace population has been reflected in statistical data. KPMG data shows that currently 40% of employees view AI-induced job loss as a core concern, a proportion that has nearly doubled year-on-year. 职场群体的危机感已反映在统计数据中。毕马威（KPMG）数据显示，目前有 40% 的员工将 AI 引发的失业视为核心担忧，该比例同比激增近一倍。

Joe Depa, EY Global Chief Innovation Officer, confirmed this workplace polarization, stating that junior employees within enterprises have extremely high adoption rates of AI tools, while some senior software engineers, due to their resistance to using AI, have seen their actual productivity fall behind AI-assisted peers by 10 to 20 times. 安永（EY）全球首席创新官 Joe Depa 证实了这一职场分化现象，他表示企业内部初级员工对 AI 工具的采用率极高，而部分资深软件工程师因抗拒使用 AI，其实际生产力已被借助 AI 的同行拉开 10 倍至 20 倍的差距。

item.title: 小米迎来 16 岁生日，王腾庆生
item.guid: 小米迎来-16-岁生日，王腾庆生
item.description:
On April 6, 2010, Beijing Xiaomi Technology Co., Ltd. was officially established and moved into Yingu Building. 2010 年 4 月 6 日，北京小米科技有限公司正式成立，并入驻银谷大厦。

On August 16 of the same year, the first internal beta version of MIUI was launched; in December, Xiaomi also released "MiTalk," a free instant messaging tool for mobile phones across different communication operators. At the Xiaomi launch event on August 16 the following year, the 1999 yuan Xiaomi Phone 1 was officially released. 同年 8 月 16 日，MIUI 首个内测版推出；12 月，小米还发布了跨通信运营商的手机端免费即时通讯工具「米聊」。次年 8 月 16 日的小米发布会上，1999 元的小米手机 1 正式发布。

Yesterday, Xiaomi founder Lei Jun, Group President Lu Weibing, Xiaomi China Market Department General Manager Wei Siqi, and other executives posted messages of blessing. Former Xiaomi China Market Department General Manager Wang Teng also reposted Lei Jun's Weibo, saying, "Happy 16th birthday, Xiaomi!" 昨日，小米创办人雷军、集团总裁卢伟冰、小米中国区市场部总经理魏思琪等一众高管发文祝福。而前小米中国区市场部总经理王腾也转发雷军微博并表示「祝小米 16 岁生日快乐！」。

Additionally, Xiaomi REDMI Product Manager Hu Xinxin revealed in a celebratory video that new product news will be announced today. 另外，小米 REDMI 产品经理胡馨心在庆祝视频中透露，将在今天公布新品消息。

item.title: OpenAI 推出安全研究奖学金
item.guid: OpenAI-推出安全研究奖学金
item.description:
OpenAI today announced the launch of the "OpenAI Safety Fellowship" program, open to external researchers, engineers, and practitioners, aiming to support independent research on the safety and alignment of advanced AI systems and cultivate the next generation of AI safety talent. OpenAI 今天宣布推出「OpenAI Safety Fellowship」（OpenAI 安全研究奖学金）项目，面向外部研究人员、工程师及从业者开放申请，旨在支持针对先进 AI 系统安全性与对齐问题的独立研究，并培养下一代 AI 安全领域人才。

This program is a pilot initiative, running from September 14 this year to February 5 next year. Priority areas include safety evaluation and ethics, robustness and scalable mitigation measures, privacy-preserving safety methods, AI agent oversight, and high-risk misuse scenarios. 该项目为试点计划，将于今年 9 月 14 日至明年 2 月 5 日期间运行，优先方向涵盖安全评估与伦理、健壮性与可扩展缓解措施、隐私保护安全方法、AI 智能体监督与高危误用场景。

Selected Fellows will work closely with internal OpenAI mentors and form a learning community with fellow researchers. The program provides office space in Berkeley, shared with other Constellation Fellows, and also supports remote participation. 入选的 Fellow 将与 OpenAI 内部导师紧密合作，并与同期研究者组成学习社群。项目在伯克利提供办公场所，与 Constellation 的其他 Fellow 共享空间，同时也支持远程参与。

During the program, Fellows must complete a substantial research output, which can be in the form of a paper, benchmark, or dataset. The program provides a monthly stipend, computing power support, and continuous mentor guidance, as well as resources such as API credits, but does not grant access to OpenAI's internal systems. 项目期间，Fellow 须完成一项实质性研究成果，形式包括论文、基准测试或数据集。项目提供月度津贴、算力支持及持续导师指导，同时提供 API credits 等资源，但不授予 OpenAI 内部系统访问权限。

Applications require submission of recommendation letters. The application channel is now open, with a deadline of May 3 this year, and admission results will be announced by July 25. 申请需提交推荐信，目前申请通道已开放，截止日期为今年 5 月 3 日，录取结果将于 7 月 25 日前通知。

item.title: Vibe Coding 立功，App Store 应用提交量暴涨
item.guid: Vibe-Coding-立功，App-Store-应用提交量暴涨
item.description:
According to The Information, citing Sensor Tower data: 据 The Information 援引机构 Sensor Tower 数据报道：

Apple's App Store saw an 84% year-over-year surge in new app releases in Q1 2026, primarily driven by the widespread adoption of AI-assisted coding tools (Vibe Coding).

Data shows that the global App Store saw 235,800 new apps in Q1 2026, a significant 84% increase compared to the same period last year. Previously in 2025, the number of new apps launched had already achieved a 30% growth, totaling nearly 600,000. 数据显示，2026 年第一季度全球 App Store 新增应用数量达到 23.58 万款，较去年同期大幅增长 84%。此前在 2025 年，新应用上架数量已实现 30% 的增长，总量近 60 万款。

Sensor Tower analysts point out that this data explosion aligns perfectly with the widespread release of agent-based AI coding tools (such as Anthropic's Claude Code and OpenAI's Codex), which have significantly lowered the barrier to app creation. Currently, new apps are primarily concentrated in categories such as productivity, photos, videos, and weather. Sensor Tower 分析师指出，这一数据的爆发与代理型 AI 编程工具（如 Anthropic 的 Claude Code 及 OpenAI 的 Codex）的广泛发布高度吻合，这类工具大幅降低了应用创建的门槛。目前，新增应用主要集中在生产力、照片、视频和天气等类别。

Regarding the surge in app submissions and external doubts about "severe app review delays," Apple officially denied the claims. 针对应用提交量的激增与外界关于「应用审核严重延误」的质疑，苹果公司官方予以否认。

Apple disclosed that its review team processed an average of over 200,000 app submissions per week over the past 12 weeks, with 90% of apps being reviewed within 48 hours, maintaining an average review cycle of 1.5 days. 苹果披露，其审核团队在过去 12 周内每周平均处理超 20 万份应用提交，其中 90% 的应用在 48 小时内完成审核，平均审核周期维持在 1.5 天。

An Apple spokesperson also confirmed that, in addition to manual review, the company is gradually introducing AI tools to assist in handling the increasing workload of reviews. 苹果发言人同时确认，在人工审核的基础上，公司正逐步引入 AI 工具以辅助处理日益增长的审核工作量。

item.title: 英特尔高管：Raptor Lake 处理器仍是核心战略组成
item.guid: 英特尔高管：Raptor-Lake-处理器仍是核心战略组成
item.description:
According to Club386, Robert Hallock, Intel's Vice President and General Manager of Enthusiast Channel Business, recently stated in an interview: 据 Club386 报道，英特尔副总裁、发烧友渠道业务总经理 Robert Hallock 日前在接受采访时表示：

Although Intel has just released its latest Arrow Lake Refresh processors, Raptor Lake remains an important part of its strategy and will not exit the market in the short term.

Hallock promised that to meet the current demand for user installations, Raptor Lake processors will continue to maintain ample market supply. Hallock 承诺，为满足当前用户的装机需求，Raptor Lake 处理器将继续保持充足的市场供应量。

Regarding related developments in the motherboard market, Hallock pointed out that some newly released motherboards have begun to offer both DDR4 and DDR5 memory slots as a bridge for users to transition. 针对主板市场的相关动向，Hallock 指出，已有部分新发布的主板开始同时提供 DDR4 与 DDR5 内存插槽，以此作为用户过渡的桥梁。

It is reported that he hinted that more small and medium-sized motherboard manufacturers (ODMs) might enter this niche market in the future, launching dual-standard hybrid slot motherboards to fill the market gap left by larger manufacturers. 据报道称，其暗示未来可能会有更多中小型主板制造商（ODM）进入该细分市场，推出双制式混合插槽主板，以填补大型厂商留下的市场空白。

item.title: 苹果批准英伟达、AMD 外接显卡驱动，但不能用来打游戏
item.guid: 苹果批准英伟达、AMD-外接显卡驱动，但不能用来打游戏
item.description:
AI startup Tiny Corp recently announced that Apple has officially approved its drivers for AMD and Nvidia external GPUs (eGPUs), enabling Macs with Apple chips to connect external graphics cards via Thunderbolt or USB4 to run AI inference tasks. AI 初创公司 Tiny Corp 近日宣布，苹果已正式批准其为 AMD 和英伟达外接 GPU（eGPU）开发的驱动程序，使搭载苹果芯片的 Mac 得以通过雷雳或 USB4 接口连接外接显卡运行 AI 推理任务。

It's worth noting that this driver is not from AMD or Nvidia officially, but was independently developed by Tiny Corp, specifically aimed at AI inference and training scenarios, and does not support gaming . 值得注意的是，这款驱动并非来自 AMD 或英伟达官方，而是由 Tiny Corp 独立开发，定位明确指向 AI 推理与训练场景， 并不支持游戏 。

Tiny Corp posted on the X platform that the driver installation process has been greatly simplified. Tiny Corp 在 X 平台发文称，驱动程序的安装流程已大幅简化。

It's so simple that Qwen can complete the installation and then use it to run Qwen.

It is understood that the company completed its first eGPU test on Apple chips as early as May 2025, but at that time, users still needed to disable System Integrity Protection and other bypass methods for the hardware to function properly. 据悉，该公司早在 2025 年 5 月便完成了 eGPU 在苹果芯片上的首次测试，但彼时用户仍需关闭系统完整性保护等绕过手段才能使硬件正常工作。

item.title: 尼康 Z9 与经典 D5 共赴阿尔忒弥斯 2 号绕月任务
item.guid: 尼康-Z9-与经典-D5-共赴阿尔忒弥斯-2-号绕月任务
item.description:
In NASA's "Artemis II" crewed lunar orbit mission, which just departed on April 2nd, Nikon professional imaging equipment once again became a key partner for deep space exploration. 在 4 月 2 日刚刚启程的 NASA「阿尔忒弥斯 2 号」 (Artemis II) 载人绕月任务中，尼康专业影像装备再次成为深空探索的关键伙伴。

It is reported that this crewed lunar orbit mission is humanity's furthest journey into space in over half a century, laying a critical foundation for establishing a permanent base on the moon and even exploring Mars in the future. 据悉，此次载人绕月任务是半个多世纪以来人类飞往太空最远的一次征程，并为未来在月球建立永久基地乃至探索火星奠定关键基础。

This mission not only carried the tried-and-tested Nikon D5 DSLR camera, but the astronaut team also successfully managed to "just in time" add the Nikon Z9 flagship mirrorless camera to the mission list. 此次任务不仅搭载了久经考验的尼康 D5 单反相机，宇航员团队更成功争取将尼康 Z9 旗舰微单「压哨」加入任务清单。

Commander Reid Wiseman stated: "The Nikon D5 performs excellently in low-light environments, and with our long lenses, it is also very suitable for optical observation of the lunar surface, capable of a large amount of excellent photographic work." 指令长里德·怀斯曼表示：「尼康 D5 在弱光环境下表现优异，配合我们的长镜头也非常适合对月球表面进行光学观测，能完成大量出色的拍摄工作。」

In this mission, D5 will undertake the main photography work, while Z9 will undergo its first practical validation in a deep space high-radiation environment. The inclusion of Z9 is directly linked to NASA's future lunar landing plans. 此次任务中，D5 将承担主要拍摄工作，而 Z9 则首次在深空高辐射环境中接受实战验证。Z9 的加入直接关联着 NASA 未来登月计划。

According to official sources, Nikon is collaborating with NASA to develop the next-generation "Handheld Universal Lunar Camera" (HULC) based on the Z9. This system is equipped with a customized thermal control and protection system to cope with the Moon's extreme temperatures and space radiation, and will be used for Artemis III and subsequent crewed lunar missions. 据官方介绍，尼康正与 NASA 合作开发基于 Z9 的下一代「手持通用月球相机」（HULC），该系统配备定制热控防护系统，以应对月球极端温度和太空辐射，将用于阿尔忒弥斯 3 号及后续载人登月任务。

item.title: PK CEO？Anthropic 称公司倡导开放文化
item.guid: PK-CEO？Anthropic-称公司倡导开放文化
item.description:
According to Business Insider, Anthropic's Head of Growth confirmed that the company implements a highly decentralized communication mechanism, explicitly encouraging employees to openly question and debate with CEO Dario Amodei on the collaboration software Slack. 据 Business Insider 报道，Anthropic 增长主管对外证实，公司推行高度去中心化的沟通机制，明确鼓励员工在协同软件 Slack 上公开质疑并与 CEO Dario Amodei 进行辩论。

The report states that Anthropic's Head of Growth, Amol Avasare, revealed in a recent podcast that the company has opened public personal Slack "notebook" channels for every employee (including core executives). This channel serves as an internal public information stream, allowing all employees to view work updates across departments and participate directly in discussions. 报道称，Anthropic 增长主管 Amol Avasare 在近期的播客节目中披露，公司为每位员工（包含核心高管）均开设了公开的个人 Slack 「笔记本」频道。该频道作为内部公开信息流，允许全员跨部门查阅工作动态并直接参与讨论。

Amol Avasare pointed out that openly challenging leadership is a regular operating model for the company. Amol Avasare 指出，公开挑战领导层是该公司的常规运转模式。

According to a case he cited, after a recent all-hands meeting, an employee directly challenged Dario Amodei's speech in his dedicated channel, triggering a widespread internal debate. Company management believes that such confrontational communication, bypassing traditional hierarchies, directly contributed to building internal trust. 据其引述的案例，在近期一次全员会议后，曾有员工直接在 Dario Amodei 的专属频道中对其会议发言提出异议，并触发了广泛的内部辩论。公司管理层认为，此类绕过传统职级的对抗性沟通直接促成了内部信任的建立。

item.title: 💡 前 R 星工程师：现在求职太难，就像「抛硬币」
item.guid: 💡-前-R-星工程师：现在求职太难，就像「抛硬币」
item.description:
According to GamesRadar, former Rockstar Games audio engineer Rob Carr recently spoke openly about the job search difficulties during the gaming industry's downturn in an in-depth interview with Reece Reilly, host of the podcast "Kiwi Talkz". 据 GamesRadar 报道，前 Rockstar Games 音频工程师 Rob Carr 近日在接受播客「Kiwi Talkz」主持人 Reece Reilly 的深度专访时，公开谈及游戏行业寒冬下的求职困境。

Carr participated in the audio development of many top 3A titles such as "GTA 5", "Red Dead Redemption", and "L.A. Noire", accumulating 20 years of experience at Rockstar. Carr 曾参与《GTA 5》、《荒野大镖客：救赎》及《黑色洛城》等多款顶级 3A 大作的音频开发工作，在 Rockstar 积累了长达 20 年的从业履历。

However, he stated frankly that this qualification no longer provides a competitive advantage in the current job market. 然而他直言，这份资历在当下的就业市场已难以形成竞争优势。

Losing your job at some point is not pleasant, but when there are thousands of people in the exact same situation as you, you find that your 20 years of experience are no longer enough – and this would not have happened 5 years ago.

He further added that when facing 35 competitors with similar qualifications and project backgrounds, the interviewer explicitly stated that his application materials themselves were not problematic, but there were simply too many competitors with similar qualifications, and the final decision on hiring was like "flipping a coin" . 他进一步补充称，面对同等资历、同等项目背景的 35 位竞争者，面试官也明确表示，他的申请材料本身并无问题，只是同等资历的竞争者实在太多， 最终录用与否就像是「抛硬币」 。

item.title: 三星 S27 被曝新增「Pro」机型
item.guid: 三星-S27-被曝新增「Pro」机型
item.description:
According to Korean media ETNews, Samsung Electronics plans to add a "Pro" model to the Galaxy S27 series next year, officially expanding its flagship smartphone product line to a matrix of four models. 据韩媒 ETNews 报道，三星电子计划在明年发布的 Galaxy S27 系列中新增「Pro」机型，正式将其旗舰智能手机产品线扩展为四款机型的矩阵。

Industry insiders revealed that Samsung's Mobile eXperience (MX) division has developed a plan to break the "Standard, Plus, Ultra" three-model system that has continued since the 2020 Galaxy S20 series, introducing a new Pro version in the S27 series. 业内人士透露，三星移动体验（MX）部门已制定计划，打破自 2020 年 Galaxy S20 系列延续至今的「标准版、Plus、Ultra」三机型体系，在 S27 系列中引入全新的 Pro 版本。

According to informed sources, the Pro version is positioned as a high-end model. Although specific details such as screen size have not yet been finalized, it will explicitly strip away the Ultra version's exclusive S-Pen stylus functionality, while sharing most core technical specifications with the Ultra. 据知情人士确认，Pro 版定位为高端机型，虽然具体屏幕尺寸等详细规格尚未最终敲定，但明确将剥离 Ultra 版本的专属 S-Pen 触控笔功能，同时与 Ultra 共享大部分核心技术规格。

Another source indicated that Samsung plans to trickle down advanced features such as the "Privacy Display" and the 200-megapixel camera, which received positive market feedback on this year's Galaxy S26 Ultra. 另有消息源指出，三星计划将今年在 Galaxy S26 Ultra 上引发积极市场反馈的「隐私显示屏（Privacy Display）」以及两亿像素摄像头等高级特性进行下放。

In the next generation of products, models equipped with this series of high-end display technology will expand from a single Ultra version to both Pro and Ultra models. 在下一代产品中，搭载该系列高端显示技术的机型将由单一的 Ultra 版扩大至 Pro 与 Ultra 两款。

item.title: 长城新车造型公布，魏建军在线征名
item.guid: 长城新车造型公布，魏建军在线征名
item.description:
Yesterday, Zhang Fuzhi, Deputy General Manager of Marketing for Great Wall Motor's Haval brand, posted an article officially unveiling the exterior silhouette of the new flagship. 昨日，长城汽车哈弗品牌营销副总经理张福志发文，正式公布了新旗舰的外观轮廓图。

From the image, the new car will adopt a "square box" rugged off-road design; the front headlight cluster features a dual-lamp design, equipped with lidar and smart driving blue lights; the rear may be equipped with a full-size spare tire. 从图片来看，新车将采用「方盒子」硬派越野造型；前大灯组采用双灯设计，同时配备激光雷达以及智驾小蓝灯；尾部或配备全尺寸的备胎。

It is understood that the new car will be built on the latest vehicle manufacturing platform "Guiyuan" and is expected to be positioned in the market segment above 300,000 yuan. 据悉，新车将基于最新造车平台「归元」打造，预计定位 30 万级以上市场。

In addition, Wei Jianjun, Chairman of Great Wall Motor, released a video stating that internal opinions on the new car's naming are very different and discussions are intense. Therefore, he also solicited naming ideas from netizens, asking "Should it be called 'Haval HX' or 'Haval H10'?" 另外，长城汽车董事长魏建军发布视频称，新车命名内部看法很不一样，讨论很激烈，因此还向网友征集新车命名想法，「到底是叫『哈弗 HX』还是『哈弗 H10』」。

item.title: OPPO Find X9s Pro 哈苏增距镜「银色」外观公布
item.guid: OPPO-Find-X9s-Pro-哈苏增距镜「银色」外观公布
item.description:
Recently, Qiao Jiadong, OPPO's Smart Ecosystem Product Director, released a video officially announcing some exterior information about the OPPO Find X9s Pro and the new Hasselblad Professional Teleconverter. 近期，OPPO 智能生态产品总监乔家栋发布视频，正式公布了 OPPO Find X9s Pro 及全新哈苏专业增距镜的部分外观信息。

From the released images, the OPPO Find X9s Pro will continue the design of the Find X9 series, featuring a rectangular lens Deco in the upper left corner, with the telephoto lens located below the module; the flash position has changed and now adopts a circular design. 从公布的图片来看，OPPO Find X9s Pro 将延续 Find X9 系列的设计，采用左上角矩形镜头 Deco，并且长焦镜头位于模组下方；而闪光灯位置发生了改变，并且采用圆形设计。

As for the new Hasselblad Professional Teleconverter, the lens will offer a silver-orange color scheme and feature an all-metal body; from the video content, the teleconverter may provide approximately 3x magnification, and when paired with the phone itself, it may offer native optical 11x zoom. 而全新哈苏专业增距镜部分，镜头将提供银橙配色，采用全金属机身；从视频内容来看，增距镜或将提供 3 倍左右的放大，搭配手机本身，或将提供原生光学 11 倍变焦。

The new phone will be released on April 21st, featuring a 200-megapixel large-sensor ultra-clear main camera and a 200-megapixel large-sensor ultra-clear telephoto lens; simultaneously, the Find X9 Ultra will also be released. 新机将于 4 月 21 日发布，提供 2 亿大底超清主摄以及 2 亿大底超清长焦；同时 Find X9 Ultra 也将一同发布。

item.title: 微信「支付有优惠」小程序宣布停运，12 月底正式关闭
item.guid: 微信「支付有优惠」小程序宣布停运，12-月底正式关闭
item.description:
WeChat recently announced that due to business adjustments, services related to the "WeChat Pay Discounts" mini-program will be integrated and upgraded to the "WeChat Pay Withdrawal Savings" mini-program. Users will subsequently be able to claim free withdrawal coupons in the new mini-program or obtain benefits through other activities. 微信近日宣布，由于业务调整，「微信支付有优惠」小程序相关服务将整合升级至「微信支付提现笔笔省」小程序。用户后续可在新小程序中领取提现免费券，或通过其他玩法获取权益。

    Starting from 0:00 on May 11th this year, the original mini-program's gold coin collection and gifting functions will be officially discontinued, but users can still redeem prizes with the gold coins they have already obtained;

    At 0:00 on December 31st this year, the "WeChat Pay Discounts" mini-program will officially cease operations. Before then, free withdrawal coupons and discount coupons already claimed by users can still be used normally within their validity period.

WeChat PR Director "WeChat Zhou Yi" posted on Weibo yesterday, adding that this shutdown does not mean the cancellation of withdrawal discount benefits, but rather a further upgrade of related services. 微信公关总监「微信粥姨」昨日在微博发文补充称，此次关停并非取消提现优惠福利，而是对相关服务的进一步升级。

She stated that the new mini-program integrates more withdrawal discount modes, allowing users to claim free withdrawal quotas daily, directly receive coupons, and also redeem withdrawal quotas by watching short dramas, playing mini-games, and other methods. 她表示，新小程序集成了更多提现优惠模式，用户每天可领取免费提现额度，也可直接领取优惠券，同时还能通过看短剧、玩小游戏等方式兑换提现额度。

The "WeChat Pay Discounts" mini-program was launched in 2020, primarily accumulating gold coins through users' consumption behavior and allowing users to redeem these gold coins for benefits such as free withdrawal quotas. 「微信支付有优惠」小程序于 2020 年上线，主要通过用户的消费行为累计金币，并允许用户使用金币兑换提现免费额度等相关福利。

item.title: 胖东来再回应鸡蛋角黄素风波：检测全合格
item.guid: 胖东来再回应鸡蛋角黄素风波：检测全合格
item.description:
Recently, Pang Dong Lai released its second statement regarding the "Wang Hai Evaluation" canthaxanthin in eggs controversy, stating that approximately 150 test reports showed all brand fresh eggs on sale met all standards, and announced it would defend its rights according to law. 日前，胖东来就「王海测评」鸡蛋角黄素风波发布第二份情况说明，约 150 份检测报告显示所有在售品牌鲜鸡蛋各项指标全部合格，并宣布将依法维权。

Pang Dong Lai sent five brands of fresh eggs to three authoritative institutions for testing. The reports were all completed on April 3rd, showing that indicators such as heavy metals, veterinary drug residues, additives, and microorganisms all met national standards. Concurrently, on-site inspections were conducted at three manufacturers, and feed sampling results also all met standards. 胖东来将五个品牌鲜鸡蛋送往三家权威机构检测，报告于 4 月 3 日全部完成，重金属、兽药残留、添加剂、微生物等指标均符合国家标准。同期赴三家生产厂家现场核查，饲料抽检结果同样全部合格。

Regarding canthaxanthin, Pang Dong Lai cited official data, pointing out that the substance is a legal feed additive, with a limit of 8mg/kg in poultry feed, but China currently has no requirements for canthaxanthin content in fresh eggs. "Wang Hai Evaluation" confused feed additive standards with food standards. Pang Dong Lai stated that it has completed evidence collection and will pursue legal accountability. 关于角黄素，胖东来援引官方资料指出，该物质属合法饲料添加剂，蛋禽饲料中限量为 8mg/kg，但我国对鲜鸡蛋中的角黄素含量目前不作要求，「王海测评」混淆了饲料添加剂标准与食品标准。胖东来表示已完成取证，将通过法律途径追责。

The incident began on March 13th this year when "Wang Hai Evaluation" released a video claiming that Pang Dong Lai's eggs tested positive for 9.54mg/kg of canthaxanthin, exceeding the feed limit standard. Pang Dong Lai issued its first response on March 15th, stating that it would take action after official investigation results were released. 事件起于今年 3 月 13 日，「王海测评」发视频称胖东来鸡蛋检出角黄素 9.54mg/kg，超出饲料限量标准。胖东来于 3 月 15 日发布第一份回应，表示待官方调查结果出炉后再作处置。

item.title: 海外新型钓鱼诈骗曝光
item.guid: 海外新型钓鱼诈骗曝光
item.description:
According to a recent report by BleepingComputer, a new type of SMS phishing attack has erupted in multiple parts of the United States, where scammers are beginning to steal user privacy and financial information by forging court violation notices with embedded QR codes. 据 BleepingComputer 近期报道，美国多地爆发新型短信钓鱼攻击，诈骗者开始通过伪造内嵌二维码的法庭违章通知来窃取用户隐私及财务信息。

This cyberattack campaign targets multiple states, including New York, California, and Texas. 此次网络攻击活动的目标涵盖纽约、加利福尼亚、德克萨斯等多个州。

Attackers impersonate local courts or the Department of Motor Vehicles (DMV), sending users a forged "default notice" image, claiming that the recipient has an outstanding traffic violation record that has entered the enforcement stage, and demanding immediate payment of fines by scanning the QR code in the image. 攻击者冒充地方法院或机动车管理局（DMV），向用户发送一张伪造的「违约通知」图片，声称收件人存在未处理的交通违章记录且已进入强制执行阶段，要求其立即扫描图片中的二维码缴纳罚款。

After scanning the QR code, users are redirected to an interstitial page with a CAPTCHA mechanism, and then jump to a highly mimicked official payment website (such as ny.gov-skd[.]org, etc.). 扫描二维码后，用户会被重定向至带有验证码（CAPTCHA）机制的拦截页面，随后跳转至高仿的官方支付网站（如 ny.gov-skd[.]org 等）。

The phishing website uniformly requests users to pay a "$6.99 outstanding balance" and, in the process, steals core data such as the user's name, home address, phone number, and credit card details. 该钓鱼网站会统一要求用户支付 6.99 美元的「欠款」，并在此过程中窃取用户的姓名、家庭住址、电话号码及信用卡明细等核心数据。

item.title: 红果短剧：持续治理 AI 短剧素材违规使用行为
item.guid: 红果短剧：持续治理-AI-短剧素材违规使用行为
item.description:
Yesterday, the official account of Hongguo Short Drama released the "Announcement on Continuously Regulating the Illegal Use of AI Short Drama Materials." 昨天，红果短剧官方账号发布《关于持续治理 AI 短剧素材违规使用行为的公告》。

The platform stated that content compliance is a consistent requirement of Hongguo Short Drama for its producers. To regulate the creation order of AI short dramas, protect originality and legitimate rights, the platform resolutely cracks down on illegal use of AI short drama materials, unauthorized plagiarism, and other behaviors, and continuously carries out comprehensive content governance work. 平台方面表示，内容合规是红果短剧对出品方的一贯要求，为规范 AI 短剧创作秩序，保护原创与合法权益，平台坚决打击 AI 短剧素材违规使用、无授权盗用等行为，持续开展全维度内容治理工作。

It is reported that in the first quarter of this year, Hongguo Short Drama has cumulatively removed 1,718 animated dramas that violated platform governance standards, including: 据悉，今年第一季度，红果短剧已累计下架违反平台治理规范的漫剧 1718 部，其中：

In response to the frequent illegal use of AI short drama materials recently, the platform has launched a special concentrated governance effort. Currently, a comprehensive review of 15,000 works has been completed, and 670 violating works have been dealt with according to regulations.

Hongguo also announced some typical cases: illegal use of cartoon characters, illegal use of AI brand images, illegal use of original game character images, and illegal use of actor images. 红果方面还公布了部分典型案例：违规使用卡通形象、违规使用 AI 品牌形象、违规使用游戏原创角色形象、违规使用演员形象。

Hongguo emphasized that for content and producers with serious and repeated violations, the platform will take measures such as removal, banning, termination of cooperation, and even legal accountability in accordance with laws and regulations. 红果强调，对于情节严重、反复违规的内容和出品方，平台将依法依规采取下架、封禁、终止合作乃至法律追责等措施。

item.title: 《邀请》发布海报
item.guid: 《邀请》发布海报
item.description:
According to "Watchmen Hollywood" news, Olivia Wilde directed and co-starred with Seth Rogen, Penélope Cruz, and Edward Norton in the new film "The Invitation," which has released its poster. 据「守望好莱坞」消息，奥利维亚·王尔德导演并联合塞斯·罗根、佩内洛普·克鲁兹、爱德华·诺顿主演新片《邀请》发布海报。

The film is a remake of the 2020 Spanish film "Sentimental," telling the story of a couple whose marriage is in trouble after many years. One day, they coincidentally invite their sexually open neighbors from upstairs to their home as guests. This night is full of unexpected twists, gradually revealing their deeply suppressed emotions and unexplored sexual orientations. 影片翻拍自 2020 年西班牙电影《多愁善感》，讲述一对结婚多年的夫妇婚姻出了问题，一天碰巧邀请楼上性观念开放的邻居来家做客，这一夜充满意想不到的转折，逐渐揭示他们内心深处压抑的情感和未曾探索过的性取向。

The film will be released in limited theaters in North America on June 26. 该片将于 6 月 26 日北美限定影院上映。

item.title: 2026 清明档票房破 3 亿
item.guid: 2026-清明档票房破-3-亿
item.description:
According to Lighthouse Pro, as of 19:29 on April 6, the total box office for the 2026 Qingming Festival holiday period (April 4 - April 6) has exceeded 300 million. 据灯塔专业版，截至 4 月 6 日 19 时 29 分，2026 年清明档（4 月 4 日—4 月 6 日）档期总票房突破 3 亿。

Among them, the films "Super Mario Galaxy: The Movie," "I, Xu Ke," "The Rescue Plan," "Genius Game," and "My Goodness" ranked among the top five in box office during the period. 其中，影片《超级马力欧银河大电影》《我，许可》《挽救计划》《天才游戏》《我的妈耶》位列档期票房前五。
